title: Hölder estimates of weak solutions to chemotaxis systems of fast diffusion type
summary: We study a quasilinear chemotaxis system of singular type, where the diffusion operator is given by $Δu^m$ with $0<m<1$, corresponding to the fast diffusion regime, and where the chemotactic drift is nonlinear. Since Hölder continuity constitutes the optimal regularity class for weak solutions to the porous medium equation, we establish analogous regularity results for bounded solutions of parabolic--parabolic chemotaxis systems in this setting. The proof is based on a refined De Giorgi--Di Benedetto iteration scheme adapted to the coupled structure of the system. These results advance the understanding of the fine regularity properties of chemotaxis models with nonlinear diffusion, and demonstrate that the interplay between singular diffusion and aggregation exhibits a regularizing mechanism consistent with the porous medium paradigm.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有奇异扩散和非线性趋化漂移的拟线性趋化系统弱解的Hölder连续性
AI.motivation: 研究具有奇异扩散算子Δu^m（0<m<1，对应快速扩散）和非线性趋化漂移的拟线性趋化系统，由于多孔介质方程弱解的最优正则性类是Hölder连续，需要建立此类抛物-抛物趋化系统有界解的类似正则性结果
AI.techniques: 基于De Giorgi-Di Benedetto迭代方案，针对系统的耦合结构进行精细化改进
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在此设置下抛物-抛物趋化系统有界解的Hölder连续性，建立了与多孔介质方程类似的正则性结果
AI.significance: 推进了对非线性扩散趋化模型精细正则性性质的理解，证明了奇异扩散与聚集之间的相互作用展现出与多孔介质范式一致的正则化机制

title: Travelling Waves in a Mathematical Model for Oncolytic Virotherapy
summary: Oncolytic virotherapy (OVT) is a promising cancer treatment strategy in which engineered viruses selectively infect and destroy tumor cells. Motivated by the biological mechanisms underlying viral spread and tumor invasion into the tissue, we analyze a non-cooperative reaction-diffusion model capturing the invasion of tumor tissue by oncolytic viruses. Using carefully constructed upper and lower solutions together with Schauder's fixed point theorem, we establish the existence of positive travelling-wave solutions. In particular, we identify a minimal wave speed value $\bar c$ such that positive travelling waves exist for all $c \geq \bar c$ . Our analysis also highlights parameter regions where the existence of travelling waves remains ambiguous, suggesting new mathematical questions about the propagation of viral treatments through tumor environments.

AI.tldr: 建立了描述溶瘤病毒治疗中肿瘤组织入侵的非合作反应扩散模型，证明了正行波解的存在性并确定了最小波速
AI.motivation: 溶瘤病毒治疗是一种有前景的癌症治疗策略，其中工程化病毒选择性感染并破坏肿瘤细胞。研究动机源于病毒传播和肿瘤组织入侵的生物学机制，旨在分析描述溶瘤病毒入侵肿瘤组织的非合作反应扩散模型。
AI.techniques: 使用精心构造的上下解方法结合Schauder不动点定理，建立正行波解的存在性；通过分析确定最小波速值。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了正行波解的存在性，确定了最小波速值$\bar c$，使得对所有$c \geq \bar c$都存在正行波解；同时识别了行波解存在性不明确的参数区域。
AI.significance: 为溶瘤病毒治疗的数学建模提供了理论基础，揭示了病毒在肿瘤环境中传播的波动力学特性；提出的未解决问题为理解病毒治疗在肿瘤组织中的传播机制开辟了新的数学研究方向。

title: Mass splitting in the time-discrete generalized Euler equations and non-Monge solutions in multi-marginal optimal transport
summary: The time-discretized, spatially continuous generalized Euler equations are a prototype example of multi-marginal optimal transport, yet the question whether they exhibit mass-splitting (or equivalently, whether they have solutions that are not of Monge form) has remained open. Here we resolve this question by giving a mass-splitting example in one spatial dimension. Moreover we present a related and very simple fully discrete example of mass-splitting which reveals a transparent underlying mechanism.

AI.tldr: 在一维空间中构造了时间离散、空间连续的广义欧拉方程的质量分裂反例，解决了该问题长期以来的开放性疑问。
AI.motivation: 广义欧拉方程的时间离散、空间连续形式是多边际最优输运的原型问题，但长期以来未知其解是否会出现质量分裂（即非Monge形式解），这是该领域的一个开放性问题。
AI.techniques: 构造性方法：在一维空间中构造具体的质量分裂反例；离散化方法：提出完全离散的简单质量分裂例子以揭示内在机制。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在一维空间中构造了时间离散、空间连续广义欧拉方程的质量分裂解；2. 提出了一个完全离散的简单质量分裂例子，清晰地展示了质量分裂的机制。
AI.significance: 首次证明了广义欧拉方程的时间离散形式存在质量分裂现象，解决了该领域长期存在的开放性问题，对多边际最优输运理论和欧拉方程研究具有重要意义。

title: New approach for elastic collisions with singular stress functions
summary: A collision of a rubber rod to a hard floor is regarded as a simple example of obstacle problems for elastic material. In this article we have proposed a new mathematical model for the collision phenomenon by applying beam equations with singular stress functions, which is investigated in our recent works. As in the works we have established a mathematical method to deal with the singular stress function. Here, we demonstrate the validity of our modeling through observation to the numerical results. Also, we present existence and uniqueness results of the model given as initial boundary value problems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于奇异应力函数梁方程的新数学模型来描述橡胶杆与硬地面的碰撞现象
AI.motivation: 将橡胶杆与硬地面的碰撞视为弹性材料障碍问题的简单示例，需要建立能够处理碰撞现象的数学模型
AI.techniques: 应用奇异应力函数的梁方程，利用作者近期工作中建立的数学方法来处理奇异应力函数
AI.main_theorems: 证明了模型作为初边值问题的存在性和唯一性结果，并通过数值结果验证了模型的有效性
AI.significance: 为弹性材料障碍问题提供了新的数学建模方法，将奇异应力函数应用于碰撞现象分析，扩展了梁方程的应用范围

title: Quasiconvexity in the Riemannian setting
summary: We introduce a notion of quasiconvexity for continuous functions $f$ defined on the vector bundle of linear maps between the tangent spaces of a smooth Riemannian manifold $(M,g)$ and $\mathbb{R}^m$, naturally generalizing the classical Euclidean definition. We prove that this condition characterizes the sequential lower semicontinuity of the associated integral functional \[ F(u, Ω) = \int_Ω f(du) \, dμ\] with respect to the weak$^*$ topology of $W^{1,\infty}(Ω, \mathbb{R}^m)$, for every bounded open subset $Ω\subseteq M$.

AI.tldr: 建立了黎曼流形上向量丛函数的拟凸性概念，并证明了该条件刻画了相应积分泛函在弱*拓扑下的序列下半连续性。
AI.motivation: 将欧几里得空间中经典的拟凸性概念推广到黎曼流形上，研究黎曼流形上向量丛函数的拟凸性条件与积分泛函下半连续性之间的关系。
AI.techniques: 黎曼几何、向量丛理论、拟凸性分析、变分法、弱*拓扑方法、序列下半连续性分析。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了黎曼流形上向量丛函数的拟凸性概念，并证明了该条件等价于相应积分泛函在W^{1,∞}弱*拓扑下的序列下半连续性。
AI.significance: 将经典的拟凸性理论从欧几里得空间推广到黎曼流形，为黎曼流形上的变分问题和偏微分方程研究提供了新的理论基础。

title: On Liouiville Type Theorem for the 3D Isentropic Navier-Stokes System without D-condition
summary: In this paper, we establish Liouville-type theorems for the steady compressible Navier-Stokes system. Assuming a smooth solution \(u \in L^p(\mathbb{R}^3)\), \(3 \le p \le \frac{9}{2}\), with bounded density, one obtains \(u \equiv0\). This generalizes the result of Li-Yu \cite{Li-Yu} by removing the Dirichlet condition \(\int_{\mathbb{R}^3} |\nabla u|^2 \, dx < \infty\). If \(\frac{9}{2} < p < 6\), Liouville-type theorem holds under the additional oscillation condition for momentum \(ρu \in \dot{B}^{\frac{3}{p} - \frac{3}{2}}_{\infty,\infty}(\mathbb{R}^3)\). For the marginal case \(u \in L^6(\mathbb{R}^3)\), the oscillation condition can be replaced by \(ρu \in BMO^{-1}(\mathbb{R}^3)\). We also present results in Morrey-type spaces: \(u \in \dot{M}^{s,6}(\mathbb{R}^3)\) and \(ρu \in \dot{M}_w^{q,3}(\mathbb{R}^3)\) for \(2 \le s \le 6\) and \(\frac{3}{2} < q \le 3\).

AI.tldr: 建立了可压缩Navier-Stokes系统在无界区域上的Liouville型定理，推广了Li-Yu的结果并移除了Dirichlet条件限制。
AI.motivation: 研究稳态可压缩Navier-Stokes系统在无界区域上的Liouville型定理，旨在确定在何种函数空间条件下，系统的非平凡解不存在，从而推广Li-Yu的结果并移除对速度梯度平方可积性的限制。
AI.techniques: 使用L^p空间理论、Besov空间、BMO空间、Morrey空间等函数空间分析技术，结合可压缩Navier-Stokes系统的能量估计和正则性理论。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当速度u属于L^p(R^3) (3≤p≤9/2)且密度有界时，有u≡0；2. 当9/2<p<6时，需要额外的动量振荡条件ρu∈B^{3/p-3/2}_{∞,∞}；3. 边际情况u∈L^6时，条件可替换为ρu∈BMO^{-1}；4. 在Morrey型空间中建立了相应结果。
AI.significance: 推广了可压缩Navier-Stokes系统的Liouville定理，移除了对速度梯度平方可积性的限制，建立了更一般的函数空间框架下的非存在性结果，为研究无界区域上可压缩流体的渐近行为提供了理论工具。

title: Higher order H{ö}lder approximation by solutions of second order elliptic equations
summary: For a given second order elliptic operation $\mathcal{L}$ in a domain $Ω\subset{\mathbb{R}}^\mathbf{N}$, $\mathbf{N}\ $, and a compact set $\mathbf{K}\subsetΩ$, order $\mathbf{N}$-$2$-Ahlfors-David regular, we define the space $\mathcal{H}^{\mathbf{r}+ω}_{\mathcal{L}}(\mathbf{K})$ of continuous functions $f(x),\, x\in\mathbf{K}$, admitting, for any $δ>0$, a local approximation in the $δ$-neighborhood of any point $x\in\mathbf{K}$, with $δ^{\mathbf{r}}ω(δ)$-error estimate, by solutions of the equation $\mathcal{L} u=0$. For such functions, we prove the existence of a global approximation $v_δ$ on $\mathbf{K}$ with the same order of error estimate, by a solution of the same equation in a $δ$-neighborhood of $\mathbf{K}$. A number of properties of these functions $v_δ$ and their derivatives are established.

AI.tldr: 证明了在Ahlfors-David正则紧集上具有局部逼近性质的函数存在全局逼近解
AI.motivation: 研究椭圆算子方程解的逼近理论，考虑在紧集上具有局部逼近性质的函数能否找到全局逼近解
AI.techniques: 使用Ahlfors-David正则性条件、局部逼近构造全局逼近、椭圆方程理论、误差估计分析
AI.main_theorems: 定义了函数空间$\mathcal{H}^{\mathbf{r}+ω}_{\mathcal{L}}(\mathbf{K})$，证明了存在全局逼近解$v_δ$，并建立了$v_δ$及其导数的性质
AI.significance: 发展了椭圆方程解的逼近理论，为研究奇异集上解的逼近性质提供了理论框架

title: Global Hölder Solvability of parabolic equations on domains with capacity density conditions
summary: We investigate the Cauchy-Dirichlet problem for linear parabolic equations in divergence form. Under mild assumptions on the source term and the domain, we prove the existence of globally Hölder continuous solutions. Notably, our results accommodate data exhibiting singularities nearly as critical as the inverse square of the distance from the boundary.

AI.tldr: 证明了线性散度型抛物方程Cauchy-Dirichlet问题存在全局Hölder连续解，允许数据具有接近边界距离平方倒数的临界奇异性
AI.motivation: 研究散度型线性抛物方程的Cauchy-Dirichlet问题，特别关注具有边界奇异性数据的情况。传统理论通常要求数据有界或具有较弱奇异性，本文探索数据奇异性接近临界值（边界距离平方倒数）时的解正则性
AI.techniques: 使用抛物方程正则性理论、Hölder连续性估计、边界奇异性分析、散度型方程的能量方法，可能涉及加权函数空间和边界层分析
AI.main_theorems: 在源项和区域满足温和假设下，证明了全局Hölder连续解的存在性，允许数据具有接近边界距离平方倒数的临界奇异性
AI.significance: 扩展了抛物方程解的正则性理论，处理了更广泛的边界奇异数据，为具有临界边界奇异性的物理问题建模提供了数学基础

title: The W-Operator: A Volterra Fractional Time Operator with Non-Bernstein Symbol
comment: 27 pages, 3 figures. Submitted to Fractional Calculus and Applied Analysis (FCAA)
summary: We introduce a new two-parameter fractional time operator with Volterra structure, denoted by the W-operator, defined through a generalized Laplace symbol. The operator preserves the Caputo-type high-frequency behavior while allowing a controlled modification of the low-frequency regime through an additional parameter, leading to regularized memory effects. We develop a complete symbolic and Volterra theory, including explicit Prabhakar-type kernels, a left-inverse Volterra integral, and a fractional fundamental theorem of calculus. We show that the natural factorization of the Laplace symbol does not fit the classical Bernstein product mechanism and that the symbol is not a Bernstein function in general. Despite this non-Bernstein character, we establish well-posedness of abstract fractional Cauchy problems with sectorial generators by resolvent estimates and Laplace inversion, yielding a W-resolvent family with temporal regularity and smoothing properties. As an illustration, we apply the theory to a W-fractional diffusion model and discuss the influence of the modulation parameter on the relaxation of spectral modes.

AI.tldr: 提出了具有Volterra结构的新型两参数分数阶时间算子W-算子，建立了完整的符号理论和Volterra理论，并证明了非Bernstein符号下抽象分数阶Cauchy问题的适定性。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是引入一个新型的两参数分数阶时间算子，该算子能够保持Caputo型高频行为，同时通过额外参数控制低频区域的修改，从而实现正则化的记忆效应。核心数学问题是发展这种新型算子的完整理论框架，并解决其非Bernstein特性带来的分析挑战。
AI.techniques: 主要技术包括：广义Laplace符号方法、Volterra理论、Prabhakar型核函数构造、左逆Volterra积分、分数阶微积分基本定理、解析半群理论中的扇形算子方法、预解估计、Laplace反演技术，以及谱模式分析。
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果：1) 建立了W-算子的完整符号和Volterra理论，包括显式Prabhakar型核函数；2) 证明了Laplace符号的自然分解不符合经典Bernstein乘积机制，且符号一般不是Bernstein函数；3) 尽管具有非Bernstein特性，仍通过预解估计和Laplace反演建立了扇形算子生成的抽象分数阶Cauchy问题的适定性；4) 构造了具有时间正则性和光滑性质的W-预解族。
AI.significance: 理论意义在于：1) 扩展了分数阶微积分理论，引入了具有调控参数的新型算子；2) 突破了传统Bernstein函数框架的限制；3) 为具有正则化记忆效应的演化方程提供了新的数学工具；4) 在分数阶扩散模型中的应用展示了参数对谱模式松弛的影响，为物理建模提供了更灵活的数学描述。

title: Rational-Kernel Fractional Evolution Equations with Almost Sectorial Operators: A Resolvent Framework Unifying ABC and W Dynamics
summary: We study fractional evolution equations driven by rational-kernel time operators with non-singular memory, including the Atangana-Baleanu-Caputo operator and a generalized W-operator. These operators are characterized by Laplace symbols that do not necessarily belong to the classical Bernstein class. The analysis is carried out in the framework of almost sectorial operators, which allows resolvent estimates beyond standard analytic semigroup theory. Existence, uniqueness, and temporal regularity of mild solutions are established by Laplace transform techniques and contour integration, leading to the construction of associated resolvent families. A unified resolvent framework is developed, enabling a precise comparison between ABC and W dynamics and clarifying the influence of rational memory kernels on decay and smoothing properties. Several examples, including fractional diffusion-type equations, illustrate the abstract theory and highlight the impact of non-singular memory on long-time behavior.

AI.tldr: 建立了有理核时间算子驱动的分数阶演化方程的统一解析框架，特别关注Atangana-Baleanu-Caputo算子和广义W算子
AI.motivation: 研究具有非奇异记忆的有理核时间算子（包括ABC算子和广义W算子）驱动的分数阶演化方程，这些算子的拉普拉斯符号不一定属于经典Bernstein类，需要超越标准解析半群理论的分析框架
AI.techniques: 采用几乎扇形算子框架、拉普拉斯变换技术、围道积分方法，构建相关的预解族，建立统一的预解框架
AI.main_theorems: 建立了温和解的存在性、唯一性和时间正则性，构造了关联的预解族，提供了ABC和W动力学之间的精确比较，阐明了有理记忆核对衰减和平滑性质的影响
AI.significance: 为具有非奇异记忆的分数阶演化方程提供了统一的理论框架，超越了经典解析半群理论，对分数阶扩散型方程等应用有重要理论意义

title: Inhomogeneous nonlinear Schrödinger equations with competing singular nonlinearities
summary: We study nonlinear elliptic equations arising as stationary states of inhomogeneous nonlinear Schrödinger equations with competing singular nonlinearities. Working in a weighted Sobolev space that combines the homogeneous Sobolev space with a weighted Lebesgue term, we establish continuous and compact embeddings of Caffarelli--Kohn--Nirenberg type. These embeddings, together with a model that displays a natural scaling, allow us to apply the abstract critical point framework of Mercuri and Perera (2025), yielding a sequence of nonlinear eigenvalues for the associated problem. This scaling property leads to a classification of weighted power-type nonlinearities into subscaled, scaled, and superscaled regimes. Within this variational setting, we obtain broad existence and multiplicity results for equations driven by sums of weighted power nonlinearities, covering superscaled, scaled, and subscaled interactions, both in the subcritical and critical cases. We also provide a nonexistence result as a consequence of a Pohozaev-type identity. Finally, in the radial setting we employ improved radial CKN inequalities to enlarge the admissible embedding ranges. This yields strengthened radial versions of all our main results, including two-dimensional configurations with more singular weights, where no compact embeddings are available in the nonradial case.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有竞争奇异非线性项的椭圆型方程在加权Sobolev空间中的变分框架，获得了非线性特征值序列和广泛的存在性、多重性结果。
AI.motivation: 研究非齐次非线性薛定谔方程稳态解对应的椭圆型方程，这些方程具有竞争的奇异非线性项，需要处理加权空间中的嵌入问题和变分结构。
AI.techniques: 使用加权Sobolev空间、Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg型嵌入、Mercuri-Perera临界点框架、Pohozaev型恒等式、径向CKN不等式改进。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了连续和紧嵌入定理，获得了非线性特征值序列，对加权幂型非线性项进行了分类（次标度、标度、超标度），得到了广泛的存在性和多重性结果，以及径向情况下的加强版本。
AI.significance: 为具有奇异非线性项的椭圆型方程提供了系统的变分框架，统一处理了次临界和临界情况，在径向情况下突破了紧嵌入的限制，对非线性薛定谔方程稳态解研究有重要意义。

title: Existence and concentration of ground state solutions for an exponentially critical Choquard equation involving mixed local-nonlocal operators
summary: We study the Choquard equation involving mixed local and nonlocal operators \[-\varepsilon^{2}Δu+\varepsilon^{2s}(-Δ)^{s}u+V(x)u=\varepsilon^{μ-2}\left(\frac{1}{|x|^μ}*F(u)\right)f(u)\quad \text{in }\R^{2},\] where \(\varepsilon>0\), \(s\in(0,1)\), \(0<μ<2\), \(f\) has Trudinger--Moser critical exponential growth, and \(F(t)=\int_{0}^{t}f(τ)\,dτ\). By variational methods, combined with the Trudinger--Moser inequality and compactness arguments adapted to the critical growth and the nonlocal interaction term, we prove the existence of ground state solutions and describe their concentration behavior as \(\varepsilon\to0^{+}\).

AI.tldr: 证明了具有混合局部-非局部算子的Choquard方程在Trudinger-Moser临界指数增长下的基态解存在性及其集中行为
AI.motivation: 研究二维空间中混合局部-非局部算子的Choquard方程，该方程结合了经典拉普拉斯算子和分数阶拉普拉斯算子，具有Trudinger-Moser临界指数增长的非线性项，这是对经典薛定谔方程和分数阶薛定谔方程的重要推广
AI.techniques: 变分方法、Trudinger-Moser不等式、紧性论证、临界增长处理技术、非局部相互作用项分析、集中行为分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了基态解的存在性，并描述了当ε→0⁺时解的集中行为，解在势能V的最小值点附近集中
AI.significance: 将Choquard方程的研究推广到混合局部-非局部算子情形，在二维临界指数增长框架下建立了新的存在性理论，为分数阶偏微分方程和非局部问题的研究提供了新工具

title: Average gradient localisation for degenerate elliptic equations in the plane
summary:
We consider Lipschitz solutions to the possibly highly degenerate elliptic equation $ {m div} G(
abla u)=0$ in $B_1\subset\mathbb{R}^2 $, for any continuous strictly monotone vector field $G \colon \mathbb{R}^2 	o \mathbb{R}^2$. We show that $u$ is either $C^1$ at $0$, or any blowup limit $v(x)=\lim  rac{u(δx)-u(0)}δ $ along a sequence $δ	o 0$ satisfies $ 
abla v\in \mathcal{D}\cap \mathcal{S} 	ext{ a.e} $. Here, $ \mathcal{D}$ and $\mathcal{S}$ can be roughly interpreted as the sets where ellipticity degenerates from below and above, that is, the symmetric parts of $ 
abla G$ and $(
abla G)^{-1}$ have a zero eigenvalue. This is a strong indication in favor of the expected continuity of $H(
abla u)$ for any continuous $H$ vanishing on $\mathcal{D}\cap \mathcal{S}$. In contrast with previous results in the same spirit, we do not make any assumption on the structure of $G$ besides its continuity and strict monotony.

AI.tldr: 证明了高度退化椭圆方程Lipschitz解在奇点处的两种可能行为：要么在原点C¹光滑，要么任何爆破极限的梯度几乎处处位于椭圆性从上下两个方向退化的交集上。
AI.motivation: 研究高度退化椭圆方程div G(∇u)=0的Lipschitz解的奇点结构，其中G是连续严格单调的向量场。这类方程在变分问题、材料科学和几何分析中广泛出现，其退化性给正则性分析带来挑战。
AI.techniques: 采用爆破极限分析、单调向量场理论、椭圆性退化集合的刻画，以及通过序列极限方法研究解的局部行为。核心是利用严格单调性和连续性，而不对G的结构做额外假设。
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果：对于任何连续严格单调的G，方程div G(∇u)=0的Lipschitz解u在原点要么是C¹光滑的，要么任何爆破极限v(x)=lim [u(δx)-u(0)]/δ满足∇v几乎处处位于椭圆性从上下两个方向退化的交集𝒟∩𝒮中。
AI.significance: 为高度退化椭圆方程的正则性理论提供了重要进展，表明即使在没有结构假设的情况下，解的奇点也具有高度约束的结构。这支持了H(∇u)对任何在𝒟∩𝒮上消失的连续H都连续的猜想，对理解退化椭圆方程的解行为有重要意义。

title: A Kirchhoff equation with infinite conservation laws
summary: We show here that the quasilinear Kirchhoff-Pokhozhaev equation $$u_{tt}-\big(a\int_{\mathbb{R}^n} |\nabla u |^2 dx + b \big)^{-2} Δu = 0,$$ with $a\neq0$, admits conservation laws of all orders.

AI.tldr: 证明了Kirchhoff-Pokhozhaev型拟线性波动方程具有任意阶守恒律
AI.motivation: 研究Kirchhoff-Pokhozhaev型拟线性波动方程的可积性特征，这类方程在物理和数学中具有重要意义，特别是其守恒律的存在性反映了方程的哈密顿结构和可积性质
AI.techniques: 可能使用对称性分析、Noether定理、变分原理或直接构造法来寻找守恒律；对于拟线性方程，需要处理非线性项的特殊结构
AI.main_theorems: 证明了方程具有任意阶（所有阶）的守恒律，这意味着存在无穷多个守恒量，表明方程具有高度的可积性结构
AI.significance: 这一结果揭示了Kirchhoff-Pokhozhaev方程具有丰富的可积性结构，为研究这类拟线性波动方程的长时间行为、稳定性分析以及数值方法设计提供了理论基础

title: On the monotonicity of the entropy production in the Landau-Maxwell equation
summary: We study the homogeneous Landau equation with Maxwell molecules and prove that the entropy production is non-increasing provided the directional temperatures are well-distributed and the solution admits a moment of order $\ell$, for some $\ell$ arbitrarily close to $2$. It implies that for an initial condition with finite moment of order $\ell$, the entropy production is guaranteed to be non-increasing after a certain time, that we explicitly compute. This is the first partial answer to a conjecture made by Henry P. McKean in 1966 on the sign of the time-derivatives of the entropy. We also obtain algebraic decay estimates for the entropy production for large time; as well as a short-time estimate without moment assumptions.

AI.tldr: 证明了麦克斯韦分子下Landau方程熵产率在特定条件下非增，首次部分回答了McKean 1966年的猜想
AI.motivation: 研究齐次Landau方程（麦克斯韦分子模型）的熵产率时间演化，旨在回答Henry P. McKean于1966年提出的关于熵时间导数符号的猜想
AI.techniques: 利用方向温度分布条件和矩估计，通过分析熵产率的微分不等式，结合谱间隙方法和矩生成函数技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在方向温度分布良好且解具有接近2阶矩的条件下，熵产率非增；2. 对具有有限ℓ阶矩的初值，熵产率在显式计算的时间后保证非增；3. 获得熵产率长时间代数衰减估计；4. 获得无矩假设的短时间估计
AI.significance: 首次为McKean 1966年猜想提供了部分答案，建立了Landau方程熵产率演化的严格数学理论，为理解等离子体物理中熵演化提供了新工具

title: Freely floating cylinder on a 3D fluid governed by the Boussinesq equations in the axisymmetric without swirl case
summary: This paper deals with the interactions of waves governed by a non-linear dispersive Boussinesq type system with the vertical displacement of a cylindrical floating structure in an axisymmetric without swirl situation. The Boussinesq regime is a good approximation of free surface Euler's equations when the non-linear parameter and the shallowness parameter are small. The vertical motion of the floating body is governed by the Newton equation. The full coupled wave-structure interaction problem under consideration is reduced to a boundary problem. The boundary condition satisfied by the discharge is given in terms of the vertical displacement of the floating cylinder. The latter is calculated using an ODE, which requires knowledge of the trace of the surface elevation and its second-time derivative. We use the dispersion in order to exhibit a hidden second order ODE on the trace of the surface elevation. This finally allows us to rewrite the waves-structure interaction problem as a system of non-local conservative PDEs plus bounded radial terms with a dispersive boundary layer, combined with an ODE at the boundary. This is what we call the Augmented formulation. Afterwards we showed that this formulation is well-posed with two different methods. Finally, we study the return to equilibrium situation in the linear regime. In particular, we improved previous results on the explicit time decay. We showed that the center mass of the floating body cannot converge to its equilibrium faster than $\mathcal{O}(t^{-1/2})$ in 2D without viscosity and faster than $\mathcal{O}(t^{-3/2})$ with viscosity.

AI.tldr: 建立了浮体与非线性色散Boussinesq型波耦合系统的增广公式，证明了适定性并改进了线性回归平衡的衰减率估计。
AI.motivation: 研究轴对称无旋情况下圆柱形浮体与非线性色散Boussinesq型波系统的相互作用，该模型是非线性参数和浅水参数较小时自由表面欧拉方程的良好近似。
AI.techniques: 利用色散性揭示表面高程迹的隐式二阶ODE，建立包含非局部守恒PDE、有界径向项、色散边界层和边界ODE的增广公式，采用两种方法证明适定性。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立了波-结构相互作用问题的增广公式；2) 证明了该公式的适定性；3) 在线性回归平衡情况下，改进了浮体质心收敛到平衡的显式时间衰减率：无粘性时不低于O(t^{-1/2})，有粘性时不低于O(t^{-3/2})。
AI.significance: 为浮体与波相互作用提供了严格的数学框架，改进了衰减率估计，对海洋工程和流体力学中的波-结构相互作用理论有重要贡献。

title: Forward self-similar solutions to the 2D Navier--Stokes equations
summary: We construct self-similar solutions to the 2D Navier--Stokes equations evolving from arbitrarily large $-1$--homogeneous initial data and present numerical evidence for their non-uniqueness.

AI.tldr: 构造了2D Navier-Stokes方程从任意大-1齐次初值出发的自相似解，并提供了非唯一性的数值证据
AI.motivation: 研究2D Navier-Stokes方程在-1齐次初值下的解的存在性和唯一性问题，特别是探索大初值情况下解的非唯一性现象
AI.techniques: 自相似解构造方法，数值模拟技术，齐次函数理论，可能涉及尺度变换和不动点理论
AI.main_theorems: 1. 构造了从任意大-1齐次初值出发的2D Navier-Stokes自相似解；2. 通过数值证据表明这些解具有非唯一性
AI.significance: 挑战了Navier-Stokes方程解的唯一性传统认知，为理解大初值情况下的解行为提供了新视角，对流体力学数学理论有重要影响

title: Subprincipal Controlled Quasimodes and Spectral Instability
summary: Here we explore, in a series of articles, semiclassical quasimodes u(h,b), approximative solutions P(h)u(h,b)\sim 0, depending on $0<h<1$, and on b, the subprincipal symbol. We study a pseudodifferential operator with transversal intersections of bicharacteristics, where the principal symbol has double multiplicity, $p=dp=0$, in a small neigborhood $Ω$. Because of this fact, we instead study the subprincipal symbol b, and we can conclude that we get transport equations depending on b where sign changes for the imaginary part of b give approximative solutions with small support. These modes are used to estimate spectral instability, or the pseudospectrum. We also investigate the possibility that we can factorize the model operator as $P(h)=h^2P_1P_2,$ in this way actually annihilating the subprincipal symbol, thus there is no condition for the imaginary part of b. In a follow-up article, we examine different cases for more complex operators with tangential intersections of bicharacteristics, thereby generalizing the findings here.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究具有双特征线横截相交的伪微分算子的半经典拟模，通过分析次主符号b的虚部符号变化来构造具有小支集的近似解。
AI.motivation: 研究具有双特征线横截相交的伪微分算子的半经典拟模构造问题，其中主符号具有双重重数(p=dp=0)，导致需要分析次主符号b来获得近似解，用于估计谱不稳定性和伪谱。
AI.techniques: 使用半经典分析、伪微分算子理论、特征线方法、输运方程分析，以及通过因子化算子P(h)=h²P₁P₂来消除次主符号影响的技术。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了次主符号b的虚部符号变化与具有小支集的近似解存在性的关系，证明了当b的虚部符号变化时可以获得小支集拟模，并展示了通过因子化算子可以消除对b虚部的条件限制。
AI.significance: 为具有特征线相交的伪微分算子的谱不稳定性和伪谱分析提供了新的构造方法，建立了次主符号在拟模构造中的关键作用，并为更复杂的切向相交情形的研究奠定了基础。
